termination.standard: Either party may terminate this agreement with thirty days written notice.

confidentiality.standard: Both parties shall maintain confidentiality of proprietary information disclosed under this agreement.

payment_terms.standard: Invoices shall be paid within thirty days of receipt.

ip_ownership.standard: Each party retains ownership of its pre-existing intellectual property.

governing_law.standard: This agreement shall be governed by the laws of the applicable jurisdiction.

limitation_of_liability.standard: Liability shall be limited to direct damages and capped at fees paid under this agreement.

indemnity.standard: Each party shall indemnify the other against third-party claims arising from its negligence or misconduct.
